title: Nursery Rhyme. DXLVII. Natural History.
content:
Pussy cat eat the dumplings, the dumplings,
        Pussy cat eat the dumplings.
                Mamma stood by,
                And cried, Oh, fie!
        Why did you eat the dumplings?
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DXLVII. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
